Class ServletContextAdapter

java.lang.Object
org.apache.tiles.web.util.ServletContextAdapter
All Implemented Interfaces:
javax.servlet.ServletContext
public class ServletContextAdapter extends Object implements javax.servlet.ServletContext
Adapts a servlet config and a servlet context to become a unique servlet context.
Version:
$Rev$ $Date$
